omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
DATA SHARING AND DISCLOSURE
Breadfast may share the data we collect via the Picker app:

• With business partners (retailers, service providers), this includes sharing: Riders'
first name, pickup and/or dropoff locations
• Delivery recipients' first name, delivery address, and order information with their
delivery person and business partner.
• We also provide riders and delivery recipients with receipts containing information
such as a breakdown of amounts charged, driver or delivery person first name,
route map, and such other information required on invoices in the country or region
where the picker operates.
